title: Your Silence Over NUPENG’s Current Leadership Rascality Is Worrisome’, PTD Tells Union’s Elders’ Forum, Past Tanker Drivers Leaders - FinancialEDGE
description: The extended leadership crisis in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has lingered into a year and 10 months, with some concerned members taking a swipe at the Elders Forum of the parent body as well as past leaders of the Branch (PTD) for showing lack of seriousness in putting the union back
html: The extended leadership crisis in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has lingered into a year and 10 months, with some concerned members taking a swipe at the Elders Forum of the parent body as well as past leaders of the Branch (PTD) for showing lack of seriousness in putting the union back on healthy track.
